accurate.why: Accurately describes the CRA disapproval, the rule's content (northern = threatened with 4(d) rule, southern = endangered), and the Federal Register citation.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the description of the rule's content is accurate context consistent with the actual FWS rule.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as using CRA authority to nullify the FWS lesser prairie-chicken listing rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval resolutions nullify a rule rather than amending statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this disapproval resolution.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date beyond enactment; the rule is immediately nullified upon enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision: disapproval and nullification of the specified rule.

concise.why: More detailed than necessary for a single-provision disapproval resolution; includes procedural context about CRA effects that pads the summary.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and the rule's full title.

correct_figures.why: Correctly cites 87 Fed. Reg. 72674 and the November 25, 2022 publication date; May 3, 2023 Senate passage date matches.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
